calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Terrance C. Heath, Esq. for Petitioner: Zenaida Alejandro, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Cherlyn Kay Alejandro Sunga and Christina Joy Alejandro Sunga, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the two Minor to: Cherlyn Kay Alejandro and Christina Joy Alejandro.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2005 Reset To Apr-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Terrance C. Heath, Esq. for Petitioner: Zenaida Alejandro, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Cherlyn Kay Alejandro Sunga and Christina Joy Alejandro Sunga, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minors is continued to April 5, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or submit a declaration and Application for an Order dispensing with notice.
